context: Tests whether the answer keeps Swift Charts guidance focused while routing adjacent Apple-platform concerns to sibling skills.

checklist.name: Swift Charts Scope
checklist.description: Keeps chart type selection, marks, axes/scales, legends, annotations, selection, scrolling, vectorized plots, and Chart3D guidance in swift-charts scope.

checklist.name: MapKit Boundary
checklist.description: Routes MapKit annotations or map overlays to MapKit guidance rather than treating them as chart marks.

checklist.name: Navigation Boundary
checklist.description: Routes NavigationStack and deep-link implementation to swiftui-navigation.

checklist.name: Data And State Boundaries
checklist.description: Routes async networking/data loading and @Observable model ownership details to appropriate networking, concurrency, SwiftUI, or architecture skills.

checklist.name: Accessibility Boundary
checklist.description: Routes a deep VoiceOver/accessibility audit to ios-accessibility while still giving chart-specific label, color, Dynamic Type, and audio graph considerations.

checklist.name: Actionable Chart Advice
checklist.description: Still gives concise Swift Charts implementation recommendations rather than only listing handoffs.
